name: count_employees_by_city
description: Count the number of employees in each city and return results sorted by count in descending order.

params.description: Count the number of employees in each city and return results sorted by count in descending order.

rows.description: List of employee records, each with name, department, age, salary, city, and years_experience

columns.description: List of column names present in each row

city_counts.description: List of objects with city name and employee count, sorted by count in descending order

total_employees.description: Total number of employees across all cities

steps: Extract the rows list and sort_order from input arguments
Iterate through all employee rows and count occurrences of each city
Convert city count dictionary to a list of city-count objects
Sort the list by employee count in the specified order (descending by default)
Calculate the total number of employees across all cities
Return the sorted city counts and total employee count
